name: tiktok-news-video-marketplace
description: Marketplace cho plugin tiktok-news-video — sinh video tin tức chuẩn TikTok từ ảnh/video + kịch bản.

plugins.name: tiktok-news-video
plugins.description: Generate a TikTok-format (1080x1920) news video from user-supplied images/videos + a scene script typed in chat. Speaks the user's scene text verbatim, resolves narration (user MP3 or ElevenLabs v3 TTS), auto-classifies each asset's motion (pan/zoom/diagonal/passthrough) by aspect ratio, blur-pads anything that doesn't fill frame, mixes BGM at 25%, and renders end-to-end via Remotion.
